overview: Fourthspace is a comprehensive all-in-one workspace platform integrating Notes, Projects, Chat, Calendar, Payroll, Escrow, and Wallet — with role-based access, cross-category linking, analytics, automation, and a unified dashboard.
features: 7 integrated workspace categories: Notes, Projects, Chat, Calendar, Payroll, Escrow, Wallet
Role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Team Member)
Backup and restore with admin panel and scheduling
Analytics dashboard and automation rules engine
Polished AI tools with mock responses
Simulated ICP/BTC wallet with recurring payments
Enhanced landing page with calculator and pricing comparison
